commands.review_summary:
Moves Signal approval reaction hinting and binding from low-level outbound text parsing to structured approval payload rendering and after-delivery registration, with monitor-path and regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +121, Tests +591. Total +712 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows Signal reactions are appended and registered from approval-looking text in `sendMessageSignal`, and the PR adds source-level tests plus live Signal E2E proof for the structured after-delivery path.
